message.content: GitHub ActionsのCIが遅い。テストを並列実行するように最適化して

content.content:
name: CI
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: 'pnpm'
      - run: pnpm install
      - run: pnpm lint
      - run: pnpm test --filter frontend
      - run: pnpm test --filter backend
      - run: pnpm test:e2e

toolUseResult.stdout:

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4

          cache: 'pnpm'
      - run: pnpm install
      - run: pnpm lint
      - run: pnpm test --filter frontend
      - run: pnpm test --filter backend
      - run: pnpm test:e2e

content.text: 現在は1ジョブで直列実行。lint/unit test/e2eをmatrix strategyで並列化します。

input.content:
name: CI
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  lint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: { node-version: 22, cache: 'pnpm' }
      - run: pnpm install
      - run: pnpm lint

  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        package: [frontend, backend]
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: { node-version: 22, cache: 'pnpm' }
      - run: pnpm install
      - run: pnpm test --filter ${{ matrix.package }}

  e2e:
    needs: [test]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: { node-version: 22, cache: 'pnpm' }
      - run: pnpm install
      - run: pnpm test:e2e

content.text:
CIパイプラインを3ジョブに分割しました。

- **lint**: 独立実行
- **test**: frontend/backendをmatrixで並列実行
- **e2e**: unit test完了後に実行

lintとtestが同時に走るので、CIの総実行時間は大幅に短縮されます。
